scenarios.title: Calculate flat rate margin with complete three-step process across multiple sub-margin groups

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has positions identified per §3.2.2 across multiple sub-margin groups
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has positions identified per §3.2.2 across multiple sub-margin groups

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 1 positions: total absolute long market value is 30,000,000 HKD, total absolute short market value is 60,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 1 positions: total absolute long market value is 30,000,000 HKD, total absolute short market value is 60,000,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 2 positions: total absolute long market value is 750,000 HKD, total absolute short market value is 0 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 2 positions: total absolute long market value is 750,000 HKD, total absolute short market value is 0 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 3 positions: total absolute long market value is 0 HKD, total absolute short market value is 300,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 3 positions: total absolute long market value is 0 HKD, total absolute short market value is 300,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Flat margin rates under FieldType 3 are: 12% for sub-group 1, 30% for sub-group 2, 55% for sub-group 3
given_steps.step_pattern: Flat margin rates under FieldType 3 are: 12% for sub-group 1, 30% for sub-group 2, 55% for sub-group 3

given_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin multiplier of 2 is assigned per Daily Participant Margin Multiplier Report (DWH0081C)
given_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin multiplier of 2 is assigned per Daily Participant Margin Multiplier Report (DWH0081C)

when_steps.step_text: Step 1: System aggregates and compares total absolute market values of long vs short positions for each sub-margin group
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 1: System aggregates and compares total absolute market values of long vs short positions for each sub-margin group

when_steps.step_text: Step 1: System includes sub-group 1 short positions (60,000,000 HKD), sub-group 2 long positions (750,000 HKD), and sub-group 3 short positions (300,000 HKD) in calculation
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 1: System includes sub-group 1 short positions (60,000,000 HKD), sub-group 2 long positions (750,000 HKD), and sub-group 3 short positions (300,000 HKD) in calculation

when_steps.step_text: Step 2: System sums the product of absolute position market value and flat margin rate for each included position
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 2: System sums the product of absolute position market value and flat margin rate for each included position

when_steps.step_text: Step 3: System applies the flat rate margin multiplier of 2
when_steps.step_pattern: Step 3: System applies the flat rate margin multiplier of 2

then_steps.step_text: Sub-group 1: short positions included (60,000,000 HKD), long positions excluded because short absolute value is higher
then_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 1: short positions included (60,000,000 HKD), long positions excluded because short absolute value is higher

then_steps.step_text: Sub-group 2: long positions included (750,000 HKD), short positions excluded because long absolute value is higher
then_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 2: long positions included (750,000 HKD), short positions excluded because long absolute value is higher

then_steps.step_text: Sub-group 3: short positions included (300,000 HKD), long positions excluded because short absolute value is higher
then_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 3: short positions included (300,000 HKD), long positions excluded because short absolute value is higher

then_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin after applying margin multiplier equals (60,000,000 × 12% + 750,000 × 30% + 300,000 × 55%) × 2 = 15,180,000 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin after applying margin multiplier equals (60,000,000 × 12% + 750,000 × 30% + 300,000 × 55%) × 2 = 15,180,000 HKD

assumptions: Flat margin rates are obtained from FieldType 3 as specified
Margin multiplier is obtained from Daily Participant Margin Multiplier Report (DWH0081C)

scenarios.title: Flat rate margin when long and short market values are equal in sub-group

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has positions in a sub-margin group
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has positions in a sub-margin group

given_steps.step_text: Total absolute long market value equals total absolute short market value (e.g., both are 50,000,000 HKD)
given_steps.step_pattern: Total absolute long market value equals total absolute short market value (e.g., both are 50,000,000 HKD)

when_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin calculation compares long and short market values for the sub-group
when_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin calculation compares long and short market values for the sub-group

then_steps.step_text: The system determines which positions to include based on the comparison result
then_steps.step_pattern: The system determines which positions to include based on the comparison result

then_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin calculation proceeds to Step 2 with the determined positions
then_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin calculation proceeds to Step 2 with the determined positions

assumptions: The tie-breaking rule for equal long and short values is not explicitly stated in evidence; system behavior should be verified against HKEX specifications

scenarios.title: Calculate favorable MTM and derive net margin

given_steps.step_text: Market value portfolio is -300,550,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Market value portfolio is -300,550,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Contract value portfolio is -287,850,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Contract value portfolio is -287,850,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is calculated using the formula
when_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is calculated using the formula

when_steps.step_text: Net margin is derived by deducting favorable MTM from rounded aggregated margin
when_steps.step_pattern: Net margin is derived by deducting favorable MTM from rounded aggregated margin

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) equals Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio = -12,700,000
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) equals Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio = -12,700,000

then_steps.step_text: The negative number refers to a MTM requirement with absolute value 12,700,000
then_steps.step_pattern: The negative number refers to a MTM requirement with absolute value 12,700,000

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is zero in this case
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is zero in this case

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 0) = 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 0) = 46,930,000

assumptions: MTM requirement will be added after applying margin credit per §3.2.6.1

scenarios.title: Net margin when favorable MTM equals rounded aggregated margin

given_steps.step_text: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is 46,930,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is 46,930,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: Net margin is calculated using Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated margin – Favorable MTM)
when_steps.step_pattern: Net margin is calculated using Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated margin – Favorable MTM)

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 46,930,000) = 0
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals Maximum(0, 46,930,000 - 46,930,000) = 0

assumptions: This tests the boundary condition where the Maximum function returns zero
